_description: Phase Meta-CLI / Meta.2 — prompt-detection regexes for interactive CLI sessions under mChatAI+'s PTY harness. Loaded by CLIPromptPatternMatcher (macOS app). When a CLI pauses for input these fire an `awaitingInput` event, surfacing a banner in the harness UI + iOS push. Keep patterns narrow (false positives are worse than false negatives — the 20s idle detector backstops).
_scope: line (default) matches a complete output line; trailing matches no-newline tail (e.g. `? [Y/n] ` with cursor sitting after).
_update_cycle: Git PR here, then tunnel `refreshMchataisourceCache` to reload in the running app (no rebuild).

patterns.regex: Do you want to (make this edit|create this file|run this command)\?
patterns.hint: Claude Code is asking for approval

patterns.regex: Do you trust the files in this folder\?
patterns.hint: Claude Code is asking to trust the working directory
Claude Code is asking to continue
Codex is asking to run a command
Codex wants to run a shell command
Gemini CLI is asking to continue
CLI is waiting for a yes/no answer
CLI is waiting for you to press Enter
CLI is asking for a password or passphrase
